---
pagetitle: "Xorq documentation"
description: "Official Xorq documentation. Learn how to build portable, multi-engine data pipelines with deferred execution, caching, lineage tracking, and deployment-ready artifacts."
toc: false
page-layout: custom
classes: homepage
---

::::: {.hero-section}
:::: {.hero-grid}

::: {.hero-copy}
[Open source engine]{.hero-eyebrow}

# One expression, [every engine]{.accent}.

Xorq builds portable, multi-engine data pipelines with deferred execution, caching, and lineage tracking, then publishes them to a git-backed catalog you can discover and reuse.

::: {.hero-actions}
[[$]{.install-prompt} pip install xorq](how_to/install_xorq.qmd){.install-cmd title="Installation guide"}
[GET STARTED →](getting_started/quickstart.qmd){.hero-btn .hero-btn-primary}
:::
:::

::: {.hero-demo}
```{=html}
<div class="xc-panel" aria-label="Example Xorq pipeline that runs across engines">
  <div class="xc-head">
    <span class="xc-file">pipeline.py</span>
    <span class="xc-tag">multi-engine</span>
  </div>
  <pre class="xc-code"><code><span class="k">import</span> xorq.api <span class="k">as</span> xo
<span class="k">from</span> xorq.caching <span class="k">import</span> SourceCache

con = xo.<span class="m">connect</span>()             <span class="c"># embedded engine</span>
ddb = xo.duckdb.<span class="m">connect</span>()      <span class="c"># duckdb engine</span>
store = SourceCache.<span class="m">from_kwargs</span>(source=con)

pipeline = (
    xo.examples.iris.<span class="m">fetch</span>(backend=con)
    .<span class="m">into_backend</span>(ddb)         <span class="c"># hop engines, zero-copy</span>
    .<span class="m">group_by</span>(<span class="s">"species"</span>)
    .<span class="m">agg</span>(avg=xo._.sepal_width.<span class="m">mean</span>())
    .<span class="m">cache</span>(cache=store)        <span class="c"># content-addressed</span>
)

df = pipeline.<span class="m">execute</span>()        <span class="c"># deferred until here</span></code></pre>
  <div class="xc-flow">
    <span class="xc-flabel">one expression</span>
    <span class="xc-stop">embedded</span>
    <span class="xc-arrow">&rarr;</span>
    <span class="xc-stop">duckdb</span>
    <span class="xc-arrow">&rarr;</span>
    <span class="xc-stop">cache</span>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::::
:::::

::: {.content-section}

::: {.pillars}
::: {.pillar}
[Deferred execution]{.pillar-k}

Build the graph first, compute only when you execute.
:::
::: {.pillar}
[Caching]{.pillar-k}

Content-addressed results, reused across runs.
:::
::: {.pillar}
[Lineage]{.pillar-k}

Every column traced back to its source.
:::
::: {.pillar}
[Git-backed catalog]{.pillar-k}

Publish, discover, and reuse pipelines.
:::
:::

## <i class="bi bi-signpost-split"></i> Find your path

Not sure where to start? Pick the card that matches what you're trying to do.

::: {.docs-grid}
::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i>

[**Tutorials**](tutorials/core_tutorials/get-started-with-xorq-init.qmd)

Learn the basics by following a worked example
:::

::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-list-check"></i>

[**How-to guides**](how_to/install_xorq.qmd)

Get a specific task done with a focused recipe
:::

::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-lightbulb"></i>

[**Concepts**](concepts/understanding_xorq/what_is_xorq.qmd)

Understand why Xorq works the way it does
:::

::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-code-square"></i>

[**Reference**](reference/)

Look up the [Python API](reference/) or [CLI commands](api_reference/cli/)
:::
:::
:::
